---
title: "Jenny Chen"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links: 
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/Jenny77qq
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:chen52@stolaf.edu
---

## About Me

Hi! I'm Jenny Chen, a student from class of 2029 at St. Olaf College studying 
Data Science and Computer Science. I enjoy finding patterns 
in data and telling stories through visualization. 

Outside of class, I like singing, music theater, and dancing.


### Education
- **St. Olaf College** - Statistics and Data Science / Computer Science

### Skills
- R, Python, C++
- Data visualization
- Statistical analysis
